noLogsSub: Start logging to track your health!
brainMoodHint: This question helps assess your current condition
brainSymptomHint: This question helps assess the severity of your symptoms
fabCheckinSub: Let Asinu know your current condition
emergencyAlertCaregiverSub: Send an alert to your Care Circle
emergencySentDesc: Your caregiver has been notified. Please stay calm.
emergencyNotifiedDesc: Asinu has sent an emergency alert to {{count}} caregiver(s) in your Care Circle. They will contact you as soon as possible.
emergencyNotifiedAdvice: Please sit or lie down in a safe place. If you have severe symptoms (chest pain, difficulty breathing, fainting), call emergency services immediately.
emergencyNoCaregiverDesc: You don't have anyone in your Care Circle yet, so Asinu couldn't send an alert. Add family members to your Care Circle for support when needed.
emergencyNoCaregiverAdvice: If you need emergency help, please call emergency services or contact your family directly.
emergencyTypePlaceholder: Describe the symptoms you are experiencing...
checkinFollowHighAlert: Asinu needs to check on your condition
checkinGreetingMorning: How are you feeling this morning?
checkinGreetingAfternoon: How are you feeling this afternoon?
checkinGreetingEvening2: How are you feeling this afternoon?
checkinGreetingEvening: How are you feeling this evening?
checkinSubheading: Choose the status that best describes you right now
checkinDoneFineSub: Asinu will check in again at 9 PM tonight to make sure you're doing well.
checkinFollowUpHigh: Asinu will check in again in 2 hours.
checkinFollowUpNormal: Asinu will check in again in 3 hours.
checkinSeeDoctor: You should see a doctor for a check-up.
checkinSelectHint: Select one or more options below
checkinError: Could not save status. Please try again.
checkinDoneEveningSub: Sleep well! Asinu will check in with you tomorrow morning.
checkinFallbackRecommendation: Please rest and monitor. Asinu will check back later.
checkinReminder: You haven't checked in today. Tap to start!
alreadyCheckedInSub: Asinu will remind you when it's time for an update
emergencyAlertError: Could not send alert. Please try again.
